description: Python application where yaml.load() is called through a duck-typed parser protocol, triggering CVE-2020-1747 via dynamic dispatch.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: main.py calls parser.parse(data) where parser is a YamlParser instance whose parse() method calls yaml.load(), making the vulnerability reachable through duck-typed dispatch.

findings.human_justification: YamlParser.parse() calls yaml.load() and is invoked from main() via duck-typed dispatch, making the vulnerable function reachable.
